name: BTC Asymmetric Trend Persistence v1
thesis: BTC 1h is the best-fit similar-asset lane for testing trend continuation with asymmetric exit logic where trigger, risk, and exit indicators play different roles. Intraday continuation is more likely to produce usable density than forcing the same thesis onto a slower frame.
edge_mechanism: trend persistence with asymmetric exit logic
invalidation_condition: Abort if structure-hold entries are too sparse, if exit asymmetry adds complexity without real benefit, or if persistence fades before the management logic can monetize it.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: A transition into short-lived persistence where price holds structure after reclaim and continues, but requires different tools for trigger, stop logic, and exit decay.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: When intraday regimes transition, continuation can exist but is often mishandled by symmetric exits. Separating trigger, stop logic, and exit decay can preserve edge if persistence is real but uneven.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 1h is a cleaner similar-asset lane than ETH 4h for this test because the mechanism is faster and should produce denser, more interpretable continuation bursts.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market remains one-way trend-down or pure chop without accepted continuation, entries will degrade into whipsaw before exits can help.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are valid but persistence is shorter than expected, reduce runner exposure before tightening the trigger.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; RSI is used only for exits rather than entry confirmation
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: controlled by broad structure-hold definitions instead of rare breakout spikes

long: Trail 45% size by 0.65 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 >= 52
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 falls below 50 or after 8 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
short: Trail 45% size by 0.65 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 <= 48
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 rises above 50 or after 8 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
